column8: The average person in Wales speak Welsh.
column9: For a long time, education in Wales was given only in English.
column10: at one point, the Welsh language nearly died out.
column11: The Welsh Language Society sometimes hurt people during its actions.
column12: Traffic police are required to speak both English and Welsh.
column13: Many common activities in Wales today are carried out in English.
column14: People who leave Wales to find work still make good use of Welish.
column15: People have to speak english in all EU meetings.
